# AECoerceDescUPP

**Type Alias**

Defines a data type for the universal procedure pointer for the `AECoerceDescProcPtr` callback function pointer.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias AECoerceDescUPP = AECoerceDescProcPtr
```

## Discussion

For a description of a coerce descriptor callback function, see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/aecoercedescprocptr].
title: AECoerceDescUPP
